base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mario_circuit_variants — a tile from 1992 super mario kart. Mario Circuit 1-4 (asset IDs 6877/81341/81342/81343) — grassy-figure-8 tracks. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
